title: Practicante de Marketing
description:
About the job

Oportunidad de Prácticas Profesionales | Marketing




Se busca estudiante universitario(a) para integrarse como Practicante de Marketing y brindar apoyo al área en actividades operativas, analíticas y de seguimiento dentro de la industria farmacéutica.




Objetivo del puesto

Brindar soporte operativo, analítico y creativo al equipo de Marketing, colaborando en la implementación de estrategias de comunicación, promoción y posicionamiento de productos.




Responsabilidades

• Apoyar en la ejecución de campañas promocionales y actividades de marketing.

• Recopilar y analizar información de mercado, tendencias y competencia.

• Dar soporte en la organización y logística de eventos, lanzamientos y capacitaciones.

• Elaborar reportes y presentaciones para el área.

• Dar seguimiento a proyectos y estrategias de marketing.

• Apoyar en el control y seguimiento de presupuestos y órdenes de compra.

• Coordinar actividades con proveedores externos.




Requisitos

• Estudiante activo(a) de Mercadotecnia, Administración o carrera afín.

• Contar con 1.5 a 2 años para concluir la licenciatura.

• Manejo de Excel intermedio (indispensable).

• Inglés intermedio.

• Conocimiento de herramientas de análisis de datos (deseable).

• Capacidad analítica y orientación al detalle.

• Proactividad, actitud de servicio y sentido de urgencia.




Condiciones

• Duración inicial de 6 meses, con posibilidad de renovación.

• Esquema híbrido.

• Horario: Lunes a viernes de 8:00 a 14:00 hrs.

• Ubicación: Polanco, Ciudad de México.

description:
About the job

Te frustra cuando una campaña se lanza y nadie sabe realmente si funcionó? 




A nosotros también.

Por eso estamos buscando un(a) Especialista en Marketing que vea más allá de los clics y las impresiones.

Alguien que entienda que detrás de cada campaña existe un negocio, un objetivo y una oportunidad de crecimiento.




Probablemente conectes con esta vacante si alguna vez has pensado:

💭 "¿Por qué estamos haciendo esto si nadie analizó los resultados anteriores?"

💭 "Hay mejores maneras de comunicar este mensaje."

💭 "Las métricas deberían servir para tomar decisiones, no para llenar reportes."

💭 "Me gustaría participar más en la estrategia y menos en la ejecución mecánica.




Lo que harás

Liderar reuniones virtuales con clientes.
Dar seguimiento continuo a sus campañas.
Crear copys publicitarios para diferentes plataformas.
Configurar campañas y validar que todo funcione correctamente.
Analizar resultados y generar recomendaciones accionables.
Convertir datos en decisiones.




Lo que valoramos

Más que años de experiencia, buscamos criterio.

Queremos personas que sepan hacer preguntas inteligentes, identificar oportunidades y tomar decisiones respaldadas por datos.

Porque para nosotros el marketing no se trata de lanzar anuncios.

Se trata de generar resultados.




📩 Si disfrutas combinar comunicación, estrategia y análisis, esta oportunidad puede ser para ti.

description:
About the job

About The Company

DiDi Global Inc. is the world’s leading mobility technology platform. It offers a wide range of app-based services across markets including Asia-Pacific, Latin America and Africa, including ride hailing, taxi hailing, chauffeur, hitch and other forms of shared mobility as well as auto solutions, food delivery, intra-city freight, and financial services.

DiDi provides car owners, drivers, and delivery partners with flexible work and income opportunities. It is committed to collaborating with policymakers, the taxi industry, the automobile industry and the communities to solve the world’s transportation, environmental and employment challenges through the use of AI technology and localized smart transportation innovations. DiDi strives to create better life experiences and greater social value, by building a safe, inclusive and sustainable transportation and local services ecosystem for cities of the future.

For more information, please visit: www.didiglobal.com/news

About The Team/role

Being part of the Operations team gives you a unique opportunity to help drive growth at one of the fastest-growing companies in the region. This data-driven role requires a rare combination of analytical thinking, consumer empathy, operational excellence, and strong interpersonal skills.

You will work closely with a high-performing team to launch, scale, and optimize DiDi’s business across Latin America. Be prepared for a fast-paced, dynamic, and highly challenging environment. There is never a dull moment!

In this role, you will constantly seek scalable solutions while overseeing critical growth initiatives across the business. Your analyses, processes, and projects will directly contribute to DiDi’s expansion and success in LATAM.

We believe in giving our team members a level of ownership and responsibility that is above and beyond the norm. From day one, you will have the autonomy to make an impact, contribute ideas, and drive strategic decisions that shape the future of the business.

In this role, you'll be... 


Taking ownership of DiDi's growth in your region.
Build deep insights and understanding of the business and product features trough project management, stakeholder management, and be data driven ALWAYS.
Design and implement initiatives to improve business and product indicators, being able to leverage data for the decision-making process. 
Optimize processes and strategies to improve efficiency and scalability.
Support the execution of high-impact growth initiatives across multiple markets.
Ensure collaboration with multiple stakeholders to improve operational productivity & user experience.
Partner cross-functionally with Strategy, Marketing, Product, and Data teams.
Balance attention to detail with swift execution - we need to do things quickly, and we need to do them well.
Balancing those can be challenging, but this should be our strength.

We're eager to be in touch because you have...

Currently enrolled Industrial Engineering, Economics, Business, Administation, Mathematic or such related field

Proficiency with Excel

Experience with data analysis tools such as Python, SQL (it's a plus)

Data driven decision making and strong analytical thinking.

Studies with data-based decision-making, exercising good judgment in ambiguous circumstances, and effectively communicating across a diverse team.

Abilities to have optimal communication with all stakeholders, follow up on the project, and deliver results.

Creative approaches to solve complex issues and use data driven thinking to back those ideas.

Proficiency in English & Spanish.

You'll love working at DiDi because...

We create user value

We strive to always create valuable experiences for our users in everything we do. Our focus is to always innovate new experiences that are safe, pleasant and efficient.

We are data-driven

We are strong believers in making informed decisions, that’s why we are data-driven. We can better navigate the business landscape strategically by analyzing valuable metrics.

Win-win Collaboration

Success is a team sport. When we work to help our partners and colleagues win, we win, too. While keeping everyone's best interest at heart, we communicate with candor and execute with excellence in all we do.

We believe in integrity

Integrity is at the very core of our business. We are people who always want to do the right thing. Our intentions are sincere, we speak our minds and listen to each other.

Growth

We always strive to do better. That means venturing beyond our comfort zones, learning from our mistakes, and helping each other grow.

Diversity and Inclusion

Diversity is one of our biggest strengths. Our differences are what make us distinct. We respect each other and believe in equal opportunities for all.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams

At DiDi, we believe that our differences are our biggest source of strength. That’s why we are committed to promoting equal opportunities to all candidates and employees as an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Employment and advancement decisions at DiDi are always made based on the needs of the position and the qualifications of the candidate. We do not discriminate against any employee or applicant based on their gender, age, sexual orientation, nationality, marital status, pregnancy/maternity, disability, race, religion and beliefs, or any other status protected by applicable laws wherever we operate.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams, and a workplace that is free from discrimination and harassment, because that’s how we create better products and services, make better decisions and better serve the communities we’re a part of.

description:
About the job

About Puig




At Puig, we are a family-owned company with a long-term commitment to creativity, innovation, and people development. Through our Graduate Program, we are looking for exceptional young talent ready to begin their professional journey in a dynamic, international, and purpose-driven environment.




This is a unique opportunity to accelerate your career, gain exposure to a leading global organization, and contribute to the growth of prestigious dermatological brands that improve people's quality of life through science-backed skincare solutions.




Your Mission




As a Marketing Graduate (Entry Level) within our Derma Division, you will support the Marketing team in the development and execution of brand strategies, product launches, and commercial initiatives while gaining hands-on experience across multiple areas of the business.




You will work closely with cross-functional teams including Medical Affairs, Sales, Trade Marketing, Digital, and Finance, contributing to projects that have a direct impact on business performance and patient outcomes.




What You'll Do




• Support the planning, execution, and optimization of digital marketing campaigns across social media platforms, with a strong focus on TikTok and emerging digital channels.

• Assist in the creation, coordination, and publishing of engaging content aligned with brand strategies, consumer trends, and business objectives.

• Collaborate closely with the Digital & Marketing team to manage community engagement, monitor social conversations, and identify opportunities to increase brand relevance and reach.

• Support influencer and content creator initiatives, including campaign coordination, performance tracking, and reporting.

• Monitor digital KPIs and campaign performance, providing insights and recommendations to improve engagement, visibility, and business impact.

• Contribute to the development and management of a dedicated social media project aimed at healthcare professionals, helping create educational and scientifically relevant content for derma brands.

• Coordinate with Medical Visit and cross-functional teams to ensure content accuracy, compliance, and alignment with brand objectives.

• Assist in the preparation of presentations, reports, and business reviews related to digital performance, marketing initiatives, and key projects.

• Participate in local and global marketing projects, gaining exposure to brand management, consumer engagement, and omnichannel strategies.

• Provide support on ad hoc marketing initiatives, product launches, events, and special projects across the Derma division.




Who You Are

Recent graduate (Bachelor's degree completed within the last 1–2 years) in Marketing, Business Administration, Communication, Pharmaceutical Business, or related fields.
Previous internship, trainee, student leadership, or extracurricular experience is highly valued.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Excellent communication and presentation abilities.
Curious, proactive, and eager to learn.
Collaborative mindset and ability to work in diverse teams.
Passion for marketing, healthcare, skincare, and consumer behavior.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.




Requirements

Bachelor's degree completed by the start date.
Intermediate English proficiency (written and spoken).
Advanced knowledge of Microsoft Office (Excel and PowerPoint preferred).
Availability to work full-time.
Authorization to work in Mexico.




What We Offer

Participation in a global Graduate Program designed to accelerate your development.
Exposure to senior leaders and international projects.
Structured learning and development opportunities.
Mentorship and career guidance.
A collaborative, inclusive, and innovative culture.
Opportunity to build a long-term career within Puig.




Our Commitment

At Puig, we believe that diversity, equity, and inclusion drive innovation and creativity. We are committed to creating an environment where everyone can thrive, contribute, and grow.

Join us and help shape the future of dermatological skincare through science, innovation, and purpose. ✨

title: RSNA Expert - Marketing Specialist
description:
About the job

Position Summary:

We are seeking an experienced Overseas Exhibition Project Manager to oversee the comprehensive management of the entire process for international exhibitions, including the Radiological Society of North America (RSNA) annual meeting. This role will lead exhibition planning, execution, vendor coordination, and client relationship management to ensure optimal brand presentation and participation outcomes at international events. Additionally, this position will serve as a key liaison for the company's digital accounts, collaborating closely with the marketing team to effectively convert offline exhibition traffic into online digital assets.




Position Responsibilities:

1. Exhibition Project Management (RSNA & Overseas Exhibitions)

· Manage the full lifecycle of planning and execution for the RSNA annual meeting and other overseas exhibitions, including booth reservation, exhibit material shipping, construction plan coordination, and on-site services.

· Maintain efficient communication with venues, external suppliers (construction, logistics, service providers) to ensure the smooth execution of all exhibition phases.

· Develop and manage project timelines and quality standards, ensuring critical milestones are met on schedule.

· Oversee on-site operations during exhibitions, including construction supervision, activity execution, and emergency handling.

· Possess thorough knowledge of RSNA rules and regulations to ensure exhibition behavior complies with organizer requirements and mitigates compliance risks.

2. Supplier and Budget Management

· Participate in the tendering, evaluation, and selection process for service suppliers (construction, logistics, PR, etc.), managing the Request for Proposals (RFP) process.

· Prepare and monitor exhibition project budgets, including booth fees, construction costs, shipping, travel expenses, etc., ensuring expenditures stay within budget and identifying cost-saving opportunities.

· Responsible for reviewing, archiving, and ensuring compliance for all exhibition-related contracts.

3. Client Relations and Sales Support

· Maintain efficient communication with exhibitors, providing professional services and on-site support.

· Nurture existing client relationships, identify potential client needs, and assist the sales team with registration and administrative processes.

· Collaborate with the digital marketing team to ensure sales leads generated during exhibitions are effectively entered into the CRM system (e.g., Salesforce) for data integration.

4. Cross-Cultural Communication & International Coordination

· Navigate cross-regional and cross-cultural work environments, building strong collaborative relationships with overseas organizers, service providers, and partners.

· Adapt to overseas travel requirements, leading teams to participate in RSNA and other international exhibitions, providing on-site support and problem-solving.

· Coordinate with internal departments (Marketing, Sales, Product, etc.) to ensure exhibition objectives align with the company's overall strategy.

5. Documentation and Reporting

· Organize, archive, and manage exhibition-related documents, including participation contracts, service agreements, and exhibition materials.

· Regularly prepare comprehensive post-exhibition summary reports, including effectiveness evaluation, ROI analysis, and recommendations for improvement

· Monitor industry trends and exhibition developments, providing data-driven insights and optimization suggestions for the company's exhibition strategy.




Required Skills & Education:

1. Education Background

· Bachelor's degree or above, preferably in International Business, Exhibition Management, Marketing, or a related field.

2. Work Experience

· Minimum 3 years of project management experience specifically with overseas exhibitions, having successfully led the preparation and execution of multiple international events.

· Experience with RSNA or other major medical/professional international exhibitions is highly preferred.

· Experience in domestic and international exhibition organization is preferred.

3. Professional Skills

· Proficient in the full cycle of exhibition project management, including planning, execution, and evaluation.

· Familiar with international trade practices and characteristics of overseas markets, possessing strong negotiation skills.

· Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite and project management tools (e.g., MS Project, Asana).

· Familiarity with CRM systems (e.g., Salesforce) is a plus.

· Experience in financial modeling and budget management is an advantage.

4. Language Ability

· Fluent in English with excellent listening, speaking, reading, and writing skills, capable of using English as a working language for business communication with international partners.

· Overseas work or study background is highly preferred.

5. Core Competencies

· Excellent communication, coordination, and execution skills, capable of building and maintaining strong collaborative relationships across departments and international teams.

· Strong project and time management skills, able to handle multiple tasks and emergencies simultaneously.

· High sense of responsibility and strong ability to work under pressure, adaptable to overseas travel and the high-intensity pace of exhibition work.

· Strong learning agility and market insight, capable of quickly grasping industry dynamics.

· Customer-oriented mindset with attention to detail and a pursuit of excellence in the industry’s exhibition experience.

We recruit, employ, train, compensate, and promote withoutregard to race, religion, creed, color, national origin, age, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status,disability, veteran status, or any other basis protected by applicable federal, state or local law.

About the job

We are Reckitt

Home to the world's best loved and trusted hygiene, health, and nutrition brands. Our purpose defines why we exist: to protect, heal and nurture in the relentless pursuit of a cleaner, healthier world. We are a global team united by this purpose. Join us in our fight to make access to the highest quality hygiene, wellness, and nourishment a right and not a privilege.

Sales

Our Sales teams help to deliver Reckitt's purpose by building shared success with our customers, making access to the highest quality hygiene, wellness, and nourishment possible in-stores and online. Within Sales, we're focused on achieving outperformance across all of our channels, operating in highly competitive categories. This focus results in a dynamic, fast paced environment where cross functional teams are encouraged to collaborate to achieve success. We have around 10,000 sales people across the world, within market roles and ranging in areas like Field Sales, Key Accounts, Trade Marketing and Category Development.

About The Role

Dive into the dynamic world of trade marketing with Reckitt and be at the forefront of driving growth and elevating brand presence. As a Channel, you will build and execute go-to-market strategies that resonate with our trade channels and customers. This role is your opportunity to bring creativity and analytics together, influencing sales and creating lasting impacts on the market. Embrace the opportunity to leave a distinctive mark on our business, driving both our growth and yours.

Your responsibilities


 Solid background in trade marketing, sales or marketing with a proven track record of crafting compelling trade strategies.
 Insight driven with a strong understanding of trade channels and consumer behaviour.
 Excellent ability to analyse data and translate it into actionable strategies.
 Creative thinker with a results-driven mindset and ability to adapt to market shifts. - Effective communicator and influencer, adept at stakeholder engagement and negotiation.
 Proficient in using Syndicated Data (e.g., Nielsen / IRI) and tools such as Excel, PowerPoint, and relevant category management software.


The experience we're looking for


 Solid background in trade marketing, sales or marketing with a proven track record of crafting compelling trade strategies.
 Insight driven with a strong understanding of trade channels and consumer behaviour.
 Excellent ability to analyse data and translate it into actionable strategies.
 Creative thinker with a results-driven mindset and ability to adapt to market shifts. - Effective communicator and influencer, adept at stakeholder engagement and negotiation.
 Proficient in using Syndicated Data (e.g., Nielsen / IRI) and tools such as Excel, PowerPoint, and relevant category management software.


The skills for success

Trade Marketing, Field sales; Field sales management, Ecommerce, Analysing sales and Ecommerce data, Leadership skills, Consumer Insights; Shopper Insights; Customer Insights; Category Analysis, Collaboration and partnership skills; Influencing, Consultative Selling, Customer strategy; Channel strategy, Sales strategy development, Perform product planning, financial accumen, commercial accumen, Sales negotiation, P&L Management, Strategy Execution, Operational Excellence.

What we offer

With inclusion at the heart of everything we do, working alongside our four global Employee Resource Groups, we support our people at every step of their career journey, helping them to succeed in their own individual way. We invest in the wellbeing of our people through parental benefits, an Employee Assistance Program to promote mental health, and life insurance for all employees globally. We have a range of other benefits in line with the local market. Through our global share plans we offer the opportunity to save and share in Reckitt's potential future successes. For eligible roles, we also offer short-term incentives to recognise, appreciate and reward your work for delivering outstanding results. You will be rewarded in line with Reckitt's pay for performance philosophy.

Equality

We recognise that in real life, great people don't always 'tick all the boxes'. That's why we hire for potential as well as experience. Even if you don't meet every point on the job description, if this role and our company feels like a good fit for you, we still want to hear from you. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, disability or medical condition; colour, ethnicity, race, citizenship, and national origin; religion, faith; pregnancy, family status and caring responsibilities; sexual orientation; sex, gender identity, gender expression, and transgender identity; protected veteran status; size or any other basis protected by appropriate law.

description:
About the job

Growth Marketer

Seneca Cost Segregation · Remote · Salary: $2000-$3000/month + Target based bounus




About Seneca

We help real estate investors keep more of their money. Cost segregation is a tax strategy that accelerates depreciation and puts cash back in our clients’ hands, often six figures in Year 1. We’ve performed over 10,200 studies and analyzed more than $1B in cost basis, and we’ve never lost an IRS audit.

We’re a lean, fast-growing team scaling toward $5–10M. That means real ownership, real budget, and real impact from day one. No layers, no politics, no waiting for permission.




The Role

We’re hiring a Growth Marketer to own the full marketing funnel, from first touch to qualified pipeline. You’ll build the nurture and conversion systems that turn leads into sales conversations, sharpen our paid channels, and create the reporting that tells us exactly what’s working.




This is a hands-on builder role, not a team-management role (yet). You’ll do the work, with the leverage to grow as we scale. If you think in systems instead of manual effort, use AI to multiply your own output, and want to see your work move the revenue number, this is for you.




What You’ll Own

Nurture and conversion. Build and optimize nurture, re-engagement, and sales-funnel catalyst campaigns in GoHighLevel that move new leads through the funnel and into sales conversations.
Lead-to-sales handoff. Design the handoff so reps get context, not just a name. The goal is qualified leads that are ready to engage, not raw volume.
Paid search. Improve performance from Google Ads, from targeting and copy to landing pages and conversion tracking. Kill what’s not working, double down on what is.
Social creative. Manage the generation and optimization of creative for social ads, often AI-assisted. Test fast, read the data, cut losers quickly.
Reporting. Work with Operations to build improved reporting across all leads and the full marketing funnel, from first-touch attribution through to closed revenue.
The number. Own a monthly qualified-lead and pipeline target. You’ll have visibility into your performance and the autonomy to act on it.




Who You Are

Creative. You come up with the hook, the angle, and the test, not just the spreadsheet.
AI-native. You use AI well beyond chat. You’ve built loops, agents, or automations to do your own job faster, and you can show us what you’ve made.
A systems thinker. Your instinct is to build a repeatable system, not to grind through the same manual task twice.
Metrics-driven. You’re comfortable owning a number and being measured against it. You speak in CPL, CAC, conversion rate, and ROAS.
Excited by speed. You want to work at a fast-growing company where you ship, learn, and iterate, not wait on a quarterly planning cycle.
Target-based Experimenter: testing > assuming. You build and measure, adjust, repeat, and then scale. And know when to double down based on data + your experience. 

 

This Probably Isn’t a Fit If…

Your answer to every lead-gen problem is “spend more on ads.” Paid is one channel, not the strategy.
You avoid committing to a number, or treat activity as the same thing as results.




Our Stack

GoHighLevel (CRM and automation), Google Ads, Meta Ads, GA4 and Google Search Console, GTM, WordPress site, Claude AI and some Codex. You don’t need to be an expert in all of these on day one, but you should be the kind of person who gets fluent in a new tool fast and self-starts to hit your targets.




How to Apply

Send us a short note on a growth system you built and the result it drove. Include one example of a loop, agent, or automation you made to speed up your own work. We read every application that shows us something real.

Este rol es para una persona que disfrute construir, resolver y mejorar. Alguien que pueda tomar una necesidad técnica, entender el problema, proponer una solución práctica y ejecutarla con buen criterio.

El día a día puede incluir desarrollo y ajustes en sitios de Shopify y Webflow, implementación de mejoras, conexión de herramientas, automatizaciones, solución de bugs, optimización de procesos y uso de AI para trabajar de forma más eficiente.

Diseño visual es un plus, pero no es indispensable. Lo más importante es la parte técnica, la capacidad de ejecución, la curiosidad y el criterio para encontrar soluciones.

Somos una agencia moderna, orientada a objetivos y con una forma de trabajo práctica. Trabajamos con marcas de distintas industrias en proyectos de marketing, creatividad, performance, tecnología y crecimiento.

description:
About the job

Remote | Full-Time | Orange Trail

Are you a commercially driven sales professional who wants to be rewarded based on performance?

Do you understand paid advertising, media buying, or the challenges businesses face with ad account restrictions?




Are you comfortable with outbound prospecting, networking, follow-up, and taking ownership of pipeline growth?

If yes, this role could be a strong fit.




About Orange Trail: 




Orange Trail is an advertising infrastructure agency helping direct advertisers and agencies scale with more stability across major advertising platforms.




We work with high-spending advertisers across industries such as fashion, technology, health & beauty, and other performance-driven niches. Our clients rely on us to help reduce disruption from platform restrictions, improve account stability, and support continued growth.




We are now hiring one Business Development Specialist to help us generate new opportunities, build relationships, and grow our client base globally.




The Role:




You will be responsible for finding, engaging, qualifying, and nurturing potential clients and partners for Orange Trail.




This is a hands-on business development role. You will be expected to actively prospect across channels, start conversations, identify opportunities, and help move qualified leads through the pipeline.




You will start by focusing on lead generation, outbound messaging, appointment setting, follow-up, and qualification. As you prove performance and gain deeper product knowledge, you may also begin taking closing calls.




This role requires a high level of autonomy. We will provide training, direction, and support, but you should be comfortable taking ownership of your work without needing constant supervision. You will be expected to manage your own pipeline, stay organized, follow up consistently, solve problems independently, and proactively find new opportunities.




Responsibilities:




Identify and prospect potential clients through Facebook groups, forums, LinkedIn, email, communities, networking, and other relevant channels
Reach out to qualified leads through outbound DMs, emails, and other direct channels
Book qualified sales calls for the team
Follow up with existing leads and nurture opportunities in the pipeline
Qualify prospects based on their business model, ad spend, advertising challenges, and fit for our services
Maintain clean and organized pipeline activity inside our HubSpot CRM
Build relationships with potential referral partners and agencies
Learn our offer deeply and understand the common advertising problems our prospects face
Support upsell and cross-sell opportunities where relevant
Take closing calls




What Are We Looking For:




Strong sales hunger and a performance-driven mindset
Excellent written and spoken English
Ability to communicate clearly, confidently, and professionally
Self-starter attitude with strong ownership over results
Highly autonomous and able to manage your own day without constant supervision
Organized, process-oriented, and consistent with follow-up
Comfortable doing high-volume outbound prospecting
Able to figure things out independently, ask smart questions when needed, and keep moving without waiting for step-by-step instructions
Curious about paid advertising, online business, and growth marketing
Willing to learn quickly and improve based on feedback
The mindset that with enough effort, thinking, and consistency, most problems can be solved




Preferred Experience:




Previous experience in sales, business development, appointment setting, or outbound prospecting
Experience with paid ads, media buying, affiliate marketing, e-commerce, agencies, or performance marketing
Familiarity with tools such as HubSpot, Notion, Slack, Google Docs, and similar platforms
Ability to recognize common advertising issues prospects may be facing
Experience upselling or cross-selling services is a plus




What You Get:




Base pay plus uncapped commission on deals you bring in
Remote work flexibility
Opportunity to grow into a larger sales
Direct exposure to high-level advertisers and agency owners
A meritocratic environment where performance is recognized and rewarded
Training, support, and a clear path to increase your responsibility over time




 Requirements: 




You must be available 30-40 hours per week
You must be able to communicate fluently in English
You must be able to show examples of previous sales, outreach, lead generation, or business development work
Paid advertising knowledge, experience or understanding is a must
Applications must be submitted in English




How to Apply: 

We are only hiring one person for this role right now.

To apply, include the word “Scaling” in your first message so we know you read the full description.

Please also include a short summary of your previous sales, outreach, or business development experience, along with any examples of previous work or results you can share.

description:
About the job

Business Introduction

GSK remains committed to achieving bold commercial ambitions for the future. By 2031, we aim to deliver £40 billion in annual sales, leveraging our existing strong performance momentum to significantly increase our positive impact on the health of billions of patients globally. Our Ahead Together strategy is centred on early intervention to prevent and alter the course of disease, thereby protecting people and supporting healthcare systems.

Our diverse portfolio consists of vaccines, specialty medicines, and general medicines.

Through continuous innovation and a dedicated focus on scientific and technical excellence, we strive to develop and launch new, groundbreaking treatments that address critical health challenges.

Position Summary

In this role we are looking to coordinate, execute, and monitor the company’s marketing strategies, working closely with the Brand Manager. Also, you will ensure the correct implementation of campaigns, execution of promotional events, materials, and the brand’s positioning across various channels.

Key Responsibilities: 


 Coordinate the execution of marketing campaigns (digital and traditional).
 Manage the content and campaign calendar.
 Supervise external agencies and suppliers.
 Analyze markets, performance metrics (KPIs), and generate/review reports.
 Support strategic planning alongside the product and commercial team.
 Collaborate with internal teams and the sales force.
 Manage budgets and control campaign expenses.


Requirements: 


 Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communication, Business Administration, or related fields.
 Experience in marketing and elaboration of campaigns (omnichannel)
 Intermediate-advanced English.
 Intermediate-advanced Excel skills.
 Strong collaboration with product/commercial areas.


Why GSK?

Uniting science, technology and talent to get ahead of disease together.

GSK is a global biopharma company with a purpose to unite science, technology and talent to get ahead of disease together. We aim to positively impact the health of 2.5 billion people by the end of the decade, as a successful, growing company where people can thrive. We get ahead of disease by preventing and treating it with innovation in specialty medicines and vaccines. We focus on four therapeutic areas: respiratory, immunology and inflammation; oncology; HIV; and infectious diseases – to impact health at scale.

People and patients around the world count on the medicines and vaccines we make, so we’re committed to creating an environment where our people can thrive and focus on what matters most. Our culture of being ambitious for patients, accountable for impact and doing the right thing is the foundation for how, together, we deliver for patients, shareholders and our people.

If you require any type of accommodation and/or support during the selection process to better showcase your abilities (for example, access to ramps, accessible emergency exits, visual aids, etc.), please let us know when we contact you. We are here to support you.

Help us maintain, together, an inclusive and welcoming environment. By submitting information, I confirm that I agree that it will be processed in accordance with the stated privacy notice.

Full time

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About the job

About Zenit Corp

Zenit Corp is a rapidly growing ecommerce group that owns and operates multiple direct-to-consumer brands across different international markets.

Our focus is on building category-leading brands with strong fundamentals, scalable systems, and long-term growth potential. We are not building a single ecommerce business, but a portfolio of brands designed to scale aggressively over the coming years.

We are looking for creative individuals who want more than just a job. We want people who are eager to create, execute, improve, and grow alongside the company.

The Graphic Designer will be responsible for producing high-quality visual assets that strengthen our brands, support marketing initiatives, enhance communication, and help drive growth across multiple ecommerce channels.

This role is ideal for someone creative, detail-oriented, organized, and capable of translating brand direction, marketing goals, and AI-generated concepts into strong and polished visual content.

Role

The Graphic Designer is responsible for developing visual content across social media, websites, advertising campaigns, ecommerce assets, presentations, banners, and promotional materials.

This role requires strong design skills, excellent visual judgment, an understanding of branding, experience working with AI-generated imagery, and the ability to adapt creative assets across multiple formats and platforms.

The designer will collaborate closely with marketing, content, creative, and leadership teams to ensure all visual materials are consistent, engaging, brand-aligned, and execution-ready.

Graphic Designer Responsibilities❖ Graphic Design

➢ Design visual assets for social media, websites, landing pages, advertising campaigns, and ecommerce platforms.

 ➢ Create banners, presentations, promotional materials, and brand communication assets.

 ➢ Develop visually appealing and brand-consistent designs.

 ➢ Translate creative direction and campaign requirements into production-ready visuals.

❖ AI Image Generation

➢ Use AI-based image generation tools to create, enhance, and adapt visuals for campaigns, content, and ecommerce assets.

 ➢ Understand basic AI workflows such as prompting, refinement, upscaling, background creation, and variations.

 ➢ Combine AI-generated visuals with traditional design tools to produce high-quality final outputs.

 ➢ Identify opportunities to leverage AI to speed up production and improve creative output.

❖ Brand & Visual Consistency

➢ Maintain visual consistency across all brands and marketing channels.

 ➢ Apply branding principles such as typography, color systems, layout, composition, and visual hierarchy.

 ➢ Organize design files, templates, and visual resources in a structured way.

 ➢ Contribute to improving scalable design systems for multi-brand use.

❖ Creative Collaboration

➢ Work closely with the creative strategist and marketing team.

 ➢ Translate campaign objectives into effective visual executions.

 ➢ Contribute ideas for visual concepts, campaigns, and brand development.

❖ Content Optimization

➢ Adapt designs for different platforms, formats, and use cases.

 ➢ Create multiple variations of assets for testing and performance optimization.

 ➢ Refine designs based on feedback, performance data, and creative direction.

Role Objectives❖ Creative Quality & Impact

➢ Produce high-quality visual content aligned with brand identity.

 ➢ Support marketing initiatives with strong and effective creative assets.

 ➢ Improve engagement through visually compelling design.

 ➢ Strengthen consistency across all brand touchpoints.

 ➢ Improve production speed and efficiency through AI tools and optimized workflows.

Requirements❖ Experience & Technical Skills

➢ Minimum of 2 years of experience in graphic design.

 ➢ Advanced proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite or similar design tools.

 ➢ Basic experience with AI image generation tools and workflows (mandatory).

 ➢ Strong portfolio demonstrating previous design work.

 ➢ Solid understanding of layout, typography, composition, branding, and digital design principles.

 ➢ Ability to create assets for ads, social media, websites, presentations, and campaigns.

❖ Communication & Work Style

➢ B2 English level or higher.

 ➢ Strong communication skills in English and Spanish.

 ➢ High attention to detail and strong organizational habits.

 ➢ Ability to work independently as well as in a team.

 ➢ Open to feedback and able to iterate quickly.

 ➢ Strong ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines.

What We Offer❖ Compensation & Growth

➢ Salary up to USD 10,000 per year.

 ➢ High-performance, fast-paced work environment.

 ➢ Direct impact on a rapidly scaling ecommerce group.

 ➢ Long-term collaboration opportunities.

 ➢ Exposure to multiple ecommerce brands and creative challenges.

 ➢ Experience working with AI-powered design workflows and modern creative tools.

Required Equipment❖ Work Setup

➢ High-performance computer.

 ➢ Stable and fast internet connection.

 ➢ Distraction-free workspace.

Candidate Profile❖ Ideal Candidate

➢ Creative, detail-oriented, structured, and reliable.

 ➢ Strong visual judgment and understanding of brand consistency.

 ➢ Comfortable using AI tools to improve speed and quality of design output.

 ➢ Able to manage multiple projects, deadlines, and feedback cycles.

 ➢ Ownership mindset with consistent delivery of high-quality work.

 ➢ Excited to work in a fast-paced environment where design directly impacts business growth.

description:
About the job

Company Intro




At Toloka AI we create data that powers leading GenAI models and innovations. We work with frontier labs, big tech, renowned AI startups, enterprises and non-profit research organizations worldwide. We use a combination of Experts + Crowd + Tech Platform to teach AI models to reason and evaluate their efficacy and safety. We have experts in more than 50 different domains—from doctors and lawyers to physicists and engineers—and boast one of the most diverse global crowds, representing over 100 countries and speaking 40+ languages. We are a well-funded startup with an enviable portfolio of clients including Anthropic, Amazon, Microsoft, Poolside, Recraft, and Shopify.




Recently, we secured strategic investment led by Bezos Expeditions and Nebius Group with participation from Mikhail Parakhin, CTO of Shopify and board advisor to leading GenAI companies, who now serves as our Chairman of the Board. Our remote-first team is globally distributed around the world: USA, UK, the Netherlands, Israel, Czech Republic, Serbia, and more.




About the Role




Technical consultants play a key role in our company, ensuring top-level delivery of our product, its correct configuration, and the deployment of tailored AI data solutions that meet our customers’ needs and deliver an exceptional experience working with us.




As part of this role, you will not only design and implement data labeling pipelines but also act as a trusted technical advisor for our customers - helping them understand their data needs, discover new opportunities, and build scalable AI solutions.




We are looking for a person with more than 3 years of solid technical background, who feels comfortable working in technical environments, solving data-related tasks using Python and AI, and communicating directly with customers. You should be a confident communicator able to engage with both technical and executive stakeholders and collaborate closely with our commercial team.




Responsibilities




1. Client Ownership & Communication




Act as the primary technical point of contact for customers across technical and executive stakeholders.
Lead discovery conversations to deeply understand client goals, problems and quality criteria.
Translate client needs into clear, actionable solution designs and delivery plans.
Advise customers on best practices in data collection, data quality, evaluation, and model training workflows.
Set expectations proactively, communicate progress regularly, and manage risks and trade-offs transparently.
Identify expansion opportunities and additional ways Toloka can create value through data and AI solutions.

Design end-to-end data solutions using Toloka’s platform, selecting appropriate components, workflows, and quality controls.
Configure data labeling components and quality controls, develop user interfaces and AI-driven tooling (e.g. agentic systems, RAGs, synthetic data generation), and integrate them into end-to-end automated pipelines for AI training and evaluation.
Run experiments and pilots to validate quality, throughput, and cost assumptions.
Lead technical execution during delivery, coordinating internal teams and external stakeholders as needed.
Ensure solutions meet agreed quality, performance, and scalability requirements.

Own delivery outcomes holistically - including technical performance, quality, timelines, and financial efficiency.
Monitor key KPIs (e.g. throughput, quality metrics, Gross Margin, Contribution Margin) and act on deviations.
Prioritize work based on customer impact and business value.
Analyze data to identify failure modes, inefficiencies, and opportunities for improvement.
Continuously optimize solutions through iteration, automation, and adoption of new technologies.
Troubleshoot delivery, process, or technical issues in collaboration with support, infrastructure, and product teams.
Drive solutions toward stable operation with minimal ongoing maintenance.




Requirements




Core Experience




Experience as a Solution Engineer, Technical Solutions Engineer, Data Scientist, Data/Systems Analyst, or Technical Project Manager.
Proven experience owning projects end-to-end, including scoping, delivery, and stakeholder management.
Direct experience working with external customers on technical projects (requirements gathering, delivery, iteration).




Technical Skills




Strong Python skills for data manipulation (e.g. NumPy, pandas), natural language processing (e.g. NLTK, spaCy), and building lightweight web services or tools (e.g. FastAPI, Flask).
Solid understanding of ML concepts and data workflows; familiarity with LLMs and prompt engineering is a strong plus.
Experience designing multi-stage pipelines and complex systems.
Understanding of software development fundamentals: version control, testing, MVPs, iterative development etc..
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, ML/AI, Software Engineering, or a related quantitative field such as Physics or Applied Mathematics, with strong analytical foundations.
Ability to reason about trade-offs between quality, speed, cost, and scalability.




Communication & Ownership




Excellent English communication skills (B2+), with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical audiences.
Confidence working with data engineers, ML engineers, and researchers from leading tech companies.
Strong ownership mindset: comfortable being accountable for outcomes, not just tasks.
Ability to manage multiple projects in fast-paced, ambiguous environments.




Nice to have




Experience with crowdsourcing, expert workflows, or large-scale data labeling.
Experience working on ML training, evaluation, or agentic systems.
Familiarity with quality frameworks, audits, or data validation pipelines.




What we can offer




Freelance collaboration via the Ontop freelance platform.
